latest.title: Lions have dark ear marks cubs can follow

latest.title: Light beams don’t move the way your brain thinks
latest.script_key: your eyes lie to you watch my finger it s not moving the light the light s moving me that s because light is a wave not a solid thing when it hits dust in the air scattered photons paint the beam we see that s why the ray stops the second you do did your teacher ever mention that

latest.title: Bird feathers hide a color trick that fools us
latest.script_key: the blue in these feathers isn t paint it s light playing tricks the feathers are actually brown but their tiny structures scatter blue light like a prism that s why we see blue where the light hits just right next time you see a blue bird tilt your head you ll watch the color vanish

latest.title: dogs sniff more than they see in the woods
latest.script_key: this dog isn t just playing watch how it keeps its nose glued to every log that s because scent molecules stick to damp wood for hours that s why it s not staring at the squirrel it s already smelled it three trees back would you trust your nose like that
